title: oreophilus ciliaris
intro: Oreophilus ciliaris, also known as the Indian Pennywort or Gotu Kola, is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa. It is an herb that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oreophilus ciliaris include improving cognitive function, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to support overall well-being and address various health issues.
